creator: corky1951@comcast.net
text:
Update to version 2.8

	Author's changelog:

	YouTube video downloads have been fixed; downloading HD and SD videos work correctly now.  
	A new (experimental) XSPF parser has been added.
	Many bugs and UI annoyances have been fixed.
	The translations have been updated, and a new Greek translation has been added.

Fix: Minor changes only to portfiles.  No files added or deleted.
